description_long: This is a tall, narrow library building with a steeply pitched, multi-gabled roof covered in weathered, dark shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from irregularly shaped stone blocks, interspersed with dark wooden beams in a half-timbered style, giving it a medieval, storybook appearance. The windows are small, multi-paned, and framed with dark wood, some featuring decorative latticework. A prominent chimney rises from the roof, and the structure includes several protruding dormers and overhangs, adding to its complex silhouette. The main entrance is a wooden door set beneath a small overhang, flanked by windows and timber supports. The overall design suggests a historic or fantasy-inspired library, likely found in a quaint urban neighborhood or old town setting.
description: A tall, narrow stone-and-timber library with a steep, multi-gabled roof and small, lattice-paned windows, evoking a medieval or fantasy style.
description_view_0: The narrow side of the library is visible, showing a tall, steep roof, a prominent window bay, and the vertical emphasis of the structure.
description_view_1: This view highlights the long side of the building, displaying two large dormer windows, the main roof expanse, and the central chimney.
description_view_2: The front facade is shown, featuring the main entry door, symmetrical window arrangement, and decorative timber framing.
description_view_3: The opposite long side is visible, with two dormer windows and a clear view of the stone and timber wall pattern.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features exposed timber framing in a half-timbered pattern, irregular stone masonry, and decorative wooden window frames with latticework. The roofline is complex, with multiple gables, dormers, and a central chimney, all contributing to a picturesque, historic appearance.
attribute_entryway_design: A single wooden door set beneath a small overhanging roof, framed by timber supports and flanked by multi-paned windows, with subtle decorative woodwork.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are small, rectangular, and multi-paned, arranged asymmetrically with prominent dormers on the roof and grouped in pairs or singles along the facade.
